tickets.title: Add authenticated export endpoint
tickets.body: Implement the export endpoint. Verification: `npm test -- auth-export.test.mjs`. allow-suppression: none

edges.contract: T1 publishes src/contracts/export.schema.json before T2 consumes it.

tickets.title: Wire export UI
tickets.body: Use the export contract from T1. Verification: `npm test -- export-ui.test.mjs`.
